text: Protein adsorption to nanocapsules: Hard and soft protein corona studied by both direct methods and after protein extraction. A complementary analysis of the protein adsorption to nanocapsules is given with respect to the hard and soft protein corona, using both direct methods and methods involving the extraction of proteins from the protein medium.
